title: Uruguayan Beef Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy beef stir-fry inspired by Uruguayan cuisine. Quick to make and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the thinly sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the crushed red pepper, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Serve with crispy tortilla chips or fried plantains, if desired.
